tasks.question: Find the CS2 item pricing model and pricing manager logic.

input.query: CS2 item price pricing manager price source exchange rate PriceModel

tasks.question: Locate the inventory code that reads CS2 assets and user inventory.

input.query: CS2 inventory getInv getUserInventory getCSGOAssetProperties InventoryOS

tasks.question: Find trade offer status handling and recheck/revert logic.

input.query: trade offer status lifecycle checkOffer recheckTradeStatus revert trade state

tasks.question: Find TypeScript models/interfaces that describe tradable item/product data.

input.query: ProductModel ItemInfo ItemsMetaItems TypeScript interface item model

tasks.question: Find SteamID and app context helpers used when matching trade items.

input.query: SteamID 64 bit partnerIdToSteamId64 steamOffset CONTEXT_IDS matchedSteamAssetIds

tasks.question: Find CS2 trading workflow documentation and item schema/repository code.

input.query: CS2 trading workflow item schema item repository trade offer inventory parser

tasks.question: Use search and symbols to connect pricing data models with inventory asset retrieval.

input.query: PriceModel InventoryOS getCSGOAssetProperties item pricing inventory TypeScript

tasks.question: Use search and symbols to connect trade state constants with trade recheck handlers.

input.query: TRADE_PROCESS_STATES checkOffer recheckTradeStatus checkRevertOffer trade status
